---

## **A Message from Our President**

“NAMC NorCal is the go-to contractor implementation organization in Northern California. We are governed by active contractors FOR active contractors, focusing purely on delivery and moving beyond advocacy to execute actual contracts.”

---

## **Why Join or Invest in NAMC NorCal?**

### **For Contractors: Win More Work**

* **Direct Access**: We are the only organization in the region focused purely on contract delivery.  
* **Networking**: Connect directly with decision-makers at major GCs and agencies.  
* **Growth**: Access specialized training like the Turner Construction School or CRC Project Management.

### **For Sponsors: Reach the Right Partners**

* **Pipeline Access**: Gain visibility with a vetted network of active, delivery-focused minority contractors.  
* **Community Impact**: Support workforce funding and inclusion at the policy level.  
* **Strategic Branding**: Align with key regional events and legislative advocacy.

---

## **This Quarter’s Top Stories**

### 

### **Recap: 100 Years of Black History**

![][image1]

On February 26, we celebrated a century of Black History in partnership with the **OAACC**, the **City of Oakland**, and **PG\&E**.

---

## **Upcoming Events & Opportunities**

| Date | Event / Opportunity | Description |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **Feb 26** | **Turner Construction Mixer** | Connect with Turner’s team at their new Walnut Creek office regarding upcoming projects. |
| **Mar 11** | **AGC Women Build CA Summit** | Actionable tools for talent retention and industry opportunity in Santa Clara. |
| **Mar 24** | **NAMC NY Unity Gala** | Join our partners in New York for their annual gala. |
| **March** | **Turner Construction School** | New class session begins; highly recommended for networking and technical growth. |
| **Ongoing** | **CRC Project Management** | 10-week course focusing on energy efficiency and AI. |
| **Ongoing** | **[RFP opportunities with the City of East Palo Alto](https://www.cityofepa.org/rfps?field_bid_rfp_status_value_1=closed)** | opportunity to contract directly with the City and can begin monitoring future RFP releases. |

---

## **Member & Partner Spotlights**

* **New Swag**: Big thanks to board member **Mark Hall** for our new merch\! Visit our website to order hoodies, mugs, or bags for your team—funds help spread the word.  
* **In the Field**: Member **Sean Paul Guess** is currently participating in the CRC Project Management course; reach out to him with questions.  
* **Resource Launch**: We are developing a **Contractors Support Resource Guide** covering cash-flow financing and technical education. **We need your quotes\!** Share your real-life experiences to be featured.

---

## **Call to Action**

* **Visit Our New Website**: We’ve updated our links for easier membership renewal and merch access.  
* **Get Involved**: Reach out to **Shannon** or any **NAMC Board member** to connect with these opportunities.
